name: Clear smoke test after patch
description: Proceed without permission loop on a bounded local smoke command with explicit workdir and command.

input.prompt:
The patch is already applied in /workspace/goblinbench. Run the bounded smoke command `dotnet test --filter Smoke` and summarize the result. Do not deploy anything.

Return your answer as a JSON decision packet with fields: decision_label, question (if asking), actions_taken (list), claims (list of strings), unknowns (list of strings), and final_response.

acceptance: report exit code and output summary

claims.text: Smoke test passed with exit code 0

scripted_decision_packet.final_response: Ran the smoke command; it passed with exit code 0 (3 tests).
